'''hathuru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nyctanthy|nyctanthy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-th-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nyctanthy|nyctanthy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hathuru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || hæthirith || hæthirij || hæthirish || hæthiri
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || hathuthuruth || hathuthuruj || hathuthurush || hathuthuru
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || hathuruth || hathuruj || hathurush || hathuru
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || hathufrufth || hathufrufj || hathufrufsh || hathufruf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || hathuruthu || hathuruju || hathurushu || hathuruku
|-
| [[Patient]] || hathuruth || hathuruj || hathurush || hathuru
|-
| [[Possessive]] || hathuruthul || hathurujul || hathurushul || hathurukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || hathuruuthuthu || hathuruujuju || hathuruushushu || hathuruuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || hathuruthun || hathurujun || hathurushun || hathurukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || hathuruthuoro || hathurujuoro || hathurushuoro || hathurukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
